name: Stars Background
summary: A canvas-based starfield background with configurable density and twinkling animation for individual stars.
detailedDescription: Stars Background renders a dynamic starfield on an HTML5 canvas element, with each star having randomized position, size, opacity, and optional twinkling behavior. The component calculates the number of stars based on canvas area multiplied by a configurable density factor (default 0.00015 stars per pixel). Each star has a radius between 0.5 and 0.55 pixels, with random opacity between 0.5 and 1.0. Stars can optionally twinkle using sine wave oscillation - either all stars twinkle or a percentage based on configurable probability (default 70%). Twinkle speed varies randomly between min and max values (default 0.5 to 1.0). The canvas automatically resizes using ResizeObserver to match its container dimensions, regenerating stars when size changes. The animation loop updates star opacity using Math.sin() with time-based calculations, creating smooth pulsing effects. This creates a peaceful, cosmic background suitable for hero sections, dark-themed interfaces, or any context where a subtle starry atmosphere enhances the visual design without distracting from foreground content.
purpose: Add subtle twinkling motion to dark backgrounds
behavior: Generates random star positions on canvas mount/resize
Animates star opacity using sine wave oscillation
Auto-resizes canvas to match container dimensions
Configures twinkling for all or percentage of stars
Randomizes star radius and base opacity
Uses ResizeObserver for responsive canvas sizing
visualCharacteristics: Small white dots scattered across canvas
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
Use as a supporting atmospheric layer rather than the primary layout structure.
